properties.name: DISCORD_BOT_ENABLED
properties.description: Enable the Discord bot (test override)

properties.description: SMTP host used in tests

properties.description: Frontend URL used by tests

properties.description: ContaAzul redirect URI for local tests

properties.description: Habilita ou desabilita o motor de agendamentos

properties.description: Ativa o modo de teste do motor

properties.description: Identificador do médico usado no modo de teste

properties.description: URL base da integração com Feegow
